CustomField.description: Obstacles preventing successful completion of the application process.
CustomField.formula: IF( /*if 0*/ NOT(ISPICKVAL( HOMEtracker__Status__c,'Application in Process' )), '', IF(/*if 1*/ AND(OR(ISPICKVAL( PHA__Application_Status__c,'Invited' ),ISPICKVAL( PHA__Application_Status__c,'Incomplete' )), OR(ISBLANK(PHA__Application_Due_Date__c),ISNULL(PHA__Application_Due_Date__c)) ), 'Missing Application Due', IF(/*if 2*/ OR(AND(OR(ISPICKVAL( PHA__Application_Status__c,'Invited' ),ISPICKVAL( PHA__Application_Status__c,'Incomplete' )), (PHA__Application_Due_Date__c + 1) < TODAY() ), AND(ISPICKVAL( PHA__Application_Status__c,'Document Corrections' ), (PHA__Document_Request_Due__c + 1) < TODAY())), 'Past Due', IF(/*if 3*/ AND(ISPICKVAL( PHA__Application_Status__c,'Document Corrections' ), OR(ISBLANK(PHA__Document_Request_Due__c),ISNULL(PHA__Document_Request_Due__c)) ), 'Missing Document Request Due', IF(/*if 4*/ AND(ISPICKVAL( PHA__Application_Status__c,'Document Review' ), (TODAY() - (PHA__Application_Submitted__c + 1)) > 21 ), 'Stuck in Document Review', IF(/*if 5*/ AND(ISPICKVAL( PHA__Application_Status__c,'Complete' ), (TODAY() - (PHA__Documents_Reviewed__c )) > 21 ), 'Stuck in Eligibility Determination', '' /*no flag value */ )/*if 5*/ )/*if 4*/ )/*if 3*/ )/*if 2*/ )/*if 1*/ )/*if 0*/
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Obstacles preventing successful completion of the application process.
CustomField.label: Application Flag
